name: task-manager
description: Monorepo Task Manager — orquestra API, BFF e observabilidade local

scripts.dev: concurrently --kill-others-on-fail --names API,BFF,FRONTEND --prefix-colors blue,magenta,green "npm run dev:api" "npm run dev:bff" "npm run dev:frontend"
scripts.start: concurrently --kill-others-on-fail --names API,BFF,FRONTEND --prefix-colors blue,magenta,green "npm run start:api" "npm run start:bff" "npm run start:frontend"
scripts.build: npm run build:api && npm run build:bff && npm run build:frontend
scripts.test: npm run test:api && npm run test:bff && npm run test:frontend
scripts.test:coverage: npm run test:coverage:api && npm run test:coverage:bff && npm run test:coverage:frontend
scripts.lint: npm run lint:api && npm run lint:bff && npm run lint:frontend
scripts.format:check: npm run format:check:api && npm run format:check:bff && npm run format:check:frontend
scripts.sonar:api: npm --prefix api run test:cov && dotenv -e .env -- npm --prefix api run sonar:scan
scripts.sonar:bff: npm --prefix bff run test:cov && dotenv -e .env -- npm --prefix bff run sonar:scan
scripts.sonar:frontend: npm --prefix frontend run test:cov && dotenv -e .env -- npm --prefix frontend run sonar:scan
scripts.sonar:all: npm run sonar:api && npm run sonar:bff && npm run sonar:frontend
scripts.validate: npm run lint && npm run format:check && npm run test && npm run build
scripts.install:all: npm install && npm --prefix api install && npm --prefix bff install && npm --prefix frontend install
